name: Shadow Grader Always-Enforce Verdict
goal: After the tool-calling loop, ALWAYS make a dedicated verdict call with tools:[] and format:GRADER_VERDICT_SCHEMA, eliminating the regex fallback chain

tasks.name: Write new test (RED)
tasks.description: Add test_verdict_call_always_uses_format_schema inside TestGradeWithTools. Verifies that even on a no-tool-call first response, a second format-constrained verdict call is always made (call_count==2, second call has format+tools:[]).

steps.description: Run new test to verify it fails (currently only 1 API call in no-tool-calls path)

tasks.name: Restructure grade_with_tools() — always-enforce post-loop verdict
tasks.description: Two edits: (1) remove the 5-line inline post_chat() from the max-steps block, keeping only the user hint + break; (2) replace the post-loop parse/regex/retry block with a single always-enforce verdict_payload call.

steps.description: Remove inline client.post_chat() from max-steps block (lines 227-234), keeping only user hint message and break
Replace post-loop parse/regex/retry block (lines 239-272) with always-enforce verdict_payload call followed by single json.loads()
Run Task 1 test to verify it now passes

tasks.name: Fix existing tests for new call count
tasks.description: Three tests used side_effect sequences sized for the old call count. Add one extra (verdict, []) entry to each. Rename test_non_json_triggers_format_constrained_retry to test_format_constrained_verdict_recovers_non_json.

steps.description: Add 7th side_effect entry (verdict, []) to test_max_tool_steps_forces_final_verdict (6 calls in loop + 1 post-loop)
Run all four modified tests to verify PASS

tasks.name: Full test suite verification
tasks.description: Run all 14 tests (13 original + 1 new). Explicitly verify test_non_json_verdict_returns_error which uses return_value mode — both calls return non-JSON, post-loop verdict call fails json.loads(), returns infrastructure_error.
